*** 1 INJ *** NWS STORM SURVEY CONFIRMED THAT A NARROW TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN IN WETHERSFIELD. IT HAD A MAXIMUM EF SCALE RATING OF EF1 WITH WINDS ESTIMATED AT 80 TO 100 MPH. PATH LENGTH WAS 1.7 MILES AND PATH WIDTH WAS 40 YARDS. NUMEROUS LARGE TREES WERE KNOCKED DOWN...SOME THROUGH HOMES. DEFINITIVE CONVERGENCE WAS SEEN IN THE DAMAGE PATTERN FROM NOTT STREET AND PARK AVENUE...SOUTHEAST TO JUST SOUTH OF THE TOWN HALL...AND ACROSS THE GREEN BETWEEN RAYNOR LANE AND ELM STREET.
